song.title: Step by Step
song.author: Rich Mullins
song.lyrics:
[C] . G D Oh God, You are my God . C D G And I will ever praise You. . G D Oh God, You are my God . C D G And I will ever praise You.
[V1] . Em D I will seek You in the morning . Am F C And I will learn to walk in Your ways . G D And step by step You'll lead me . C D G And I will follow You all of my days.
[B] . Em D And I will follow You all of my days . Am F C And I will follow You all of my days . G D And step by step You'll lead me . C D G And I will follow You all of my days.
